title: Sun Pharma to buy Organon for $11.75B in major portfolio expansion
content:
Indian drug giant Sun Pharma has lined up an $11.75 billion acquisition of Organon, a women’s health and biosimilar maker spun out of Merck in 2021.

 The all-cash deal came in at $14 per share ...
